name: field-query
description: zone.field intrinsics configure and query interpolated field values. They are appropriate for scripted probes, section sampling, and exporting values at points that do not necessarily coincide with gridpoints.

notes: Interpolation method and quantity selection depend on field type.
Scalar fields usually do not need quantity selection.
Call init/reset around repeated queries for performance.
FLAC2D uses 'vector(x, y)' 2D points; FLAC3D uses 'vector(x, y, z)'.

validation_notes: For a single exact gridpoint value, direct gp.* intrinsics are simpler.
For arbitrary probe points, zone.field avoids nearest-gridpoint ambiguity.
Record field name, quantity, and interpolation method with exported results.
